---
title: "Model construction"
author: "Loih"
date: "2026-02-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
source("R/R_setup.R")
```


```{r}
# AUC-ROC + PR-AUC + classification metrics
calc_metrics <- function(y_true, y_prob, threshold = 0.5, eps = 1e-15) {
  y_true <- as.integer(y_true)
  y_prob <- as.numeric(y_prob)

  auc_val <- tryCatch(as.numeric(pROC::auc(y_true, y_prob)), error = function(e) NA_real_)

  pr_val <- tryCatch({
    fg <- y_prob[y_true == 1L]
    bg <- y_prob[y_true == 0L]
    as.numeric(PRROC::pr.curve(scores.class0 = fg, scores.class1 = bg, curve = FALSE)$auc.integral)
  }, error = function(e) NA_real_)

  pred <- as.integer(y_prob >= threshold)
  tp <- sum(pred == 1L & y_true == 1L)
  fp <- sum(pred == 1L & y_true == 0L)
  fn <- sum(pred == 0L & y_true == 1L)
  tn <- sum(pred == 0L & y_true == 0L)

  precision <- tp / (tp + fp + eps)
  recall    <- tp / (tp + fn + eps)
  f1        <- 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall + eps)
  acc       <- (tp + tn) / (tp + tn + fp + fn + eps)

  p <- pmax(pmin(y_prob, 1 - eps), eps)
  logloss <- -mean(y_true * log(p) + (1 - y_true) * log(1 - p))

  data.table(
    threshold = threshold,
    AUC = auc_val,
    PRAUC = pr_val,
    Accuracy = acc,
    Precision = precision,
    Recall = recall,
    F1 = f1,
    LogLoss = logloss
  )
}

find_best_threshold <- function(y_true, y_prob, th_seq = seq(0.05, 0.95, by = 0.01)) {
  scan_tbl <- rbindlist(lapply(th_seq, function(th) calc_metrics(y_true, y_prob, th)))
  best_row <- scan_tbl[which.max(F1)]
  list(best = best_row, scan = scan_tbl)
}

```


```{r}
#读取
# NOTE: You were reading from dir_model; keep as-is to match your pipeline.
train_dt <- fread(file.path(dir_model, "train_set_final.csv"))
val_dt   <- fread(file.path(dir_model, "val_set_final.csv"))
test_dt  <- fread(file.path(dir_model, "test_set_final.csv"))

label_col <- "label_buy"

#标准化标签到0/1
for (DT in list(train_dt, val_dt, test_dt)) {
  DT[, (label_col) := as.integer(get(label_col))]
}
train_dt <- train_dt[get(label_col) %in% c(0L, 1L)]
val_dt   <- val_dt[get(label_col) %in% c(0L, 1L)]
test_dt  <- test_dt[get(label_col) %in% c(0L, 1L)]

stopifnot(nrow(train_dt) > 0, nrow(val_dt) > 0, nrow(test_dt) > 0)

#特征列定义
# leakage & non-feature columns
leak_cols <- c("ui_buy", "ui_buy_rate", "ui_buy_1d", "ui_buy_2d", "ui_buy_3d", "ui_buy_4d", "ui_buy_5d", "ui_buy_6d", "ui_buy_7d")
exclude_cols <- c(
  "user_id", "item_id", "split", label_col,
  "u_pref_hour", "u_pref_dow", "i_cat",
  "u_first_time", "u_last_time", "i_first_time", "i_last_time",
  "ui_first_time", "ui_last_time", "u_label_buy",
  leak_cols
)

#读取字典
dict_file <- file.path(dir_dict, "feature_dictionary_final.csv")
  keep_cols <- fread(dict_file)$feature
  keep_cols <- intersect(keep_cols, names(train_dt))
  feat_cols <- setdiff(keep_cols, exclude_cols)
  feat_cols <- feat_cols[sapply(train_dt[, ..feat_cols], is.numeric)]


#保证训练和验证集有相同特征列
feat_cols <- Reduce(intersect, list(feat_cols, names(train_dt), names(val_dt), names(test_dt)))
stopifnot(length(feat_cols) > 0)


#类别不平衡权重
pos_rate <- train_dt[, mean(get(label_col) == 1L)]
neg_rate <- 1 - pos_rate
w_pos <- neg_rate / max(pos_rate, 1e-9)
train_dt[, weight := ifelse(get(label_col) == 1L, w_pos, 1.0)]

#训练 GLM
fm <- as.formula(paste(label_col, "~", paste(feat_cols, collapse = " + ")))

glm_fit <- glm(
  formula = fm,
  data = as.data.frame(train_dt[, c(label_col, feat_cols, "weight"), with = FALSE]),
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  weights = weight
)

#预测
val_prob_glm  <- as.numeric(predict(glm_fit, newdata = as.data.frame(val_dt[, ..feat_cols]), type = "response"))
test_prob_glm <- as.numeric(predict(glm_fit, newdata = as.data.frame(test_dt[, ..feat_cols]), type = "response"))

#验证集阈值&评估测试集
best_glm <- find_best_threshold(val_dt[[label_col]], val_prob_glm)
val_best  <- best_glm$best
best_thr  <- val_best$threshold

test_best <- calc_metrics(test_dt[[label_col]], test_prob_glm, threshold = best_thr)

cat("\n[GLM] Best threshold on VAL =", best_thr, "\n")
print(val_best)
print(test_best)

#保存输出
fwrite(best_glm$scan, file.path(dir_model, "glm_val_threshold_scan.csv"))
fwrite(val_best,      file.path(dir_model, "glm_val_best_metrics.csv"))
fwrite(test_best,     file.path(dir_model, "glm_test_metrics.csv"))

coef_tab <- summary(glm_fit)$coefficients
coef_dt <- data.table(
  feature = rownames(coef_tab),
  coef = coef_tab[, 1],
  se   = coef_tab[, 2],
  z    = coef_tab[, 3],
  p    = coef_tab[, 4]
)
coef_dt <- coef_dt[feature != "(Intercept)"]
coef_dt[, odds_ratio := exp(coef)]
coef_dt[, abs_z := abs(z)]
setorder(coef_dt, -abs_z)
coef_dt[, abs_z := NULL]

fwrite(coef_dt, file.path(dir_model, "glm_feature_importance.csv"))

```
